name: Carrier
short_description: Carrier is a Free-to-Play timing-based puzzle game. It puts you in control of an operator who must modify and encrypt a transmission signal to avoid interception.
detailed_description:
What is Carrier?
Carrier is a Free-to-Play timing-based puzzle game. It puts you in control of an operator who must modify and encrypt a transmission signal to avoid interception. Using simplistic two-button controls you'll guide the encrypted radio waves past the 'Scramblers' through 30 different levels spanning across 5 worlds.

Features:
- 5 Unique Worlds
- 30 Challenging levels
- Unique atmosphere and visual style
- Relaxing music and sound effects
- Simplistic two-button controls using either mouse or keyboard
